In rerun::external::re_types::external::uuid

rerun::external::re_types::external::uuid

Module serde

Source
Expand description

Adapters for alternative serde formats.

This module contains adapters you can use with #[serde(with)] to change the way a Uuid is serialized and deserialized.

Modulesยง

  • braced
    Serialize from a Uuid as a uuid::fmt::Braced
  • compact
    Serialize a Uuid as a [u8; 16].
  • simple
    Serialize from a Uuid as a uuid::fmt::Simple
  • urn
    Serialize from a Uuid as a uuid::fmt::Urn
